title: A maintained view of major protocol upgrades and the SIMDs behind them.
intro:
This page tracks major upgrades that shape the Solana network over time. It combines Foundation editorial context with synced metadata from the Solana Improvement Documents repository so the overview can stay useful between manual refreshes.

The goal is not to replace the full proposal text. The goal is to make it easier to see what is under review, what is moving toward activation, and which related SIMDs matter for each upgrade theme.
currentFocus:
DevRel can update this page on a periodic cadence rather than treating it like a newsroom feed. The metadata stays fresh through sync, while the editorial layer highlights what matters now, what changed recently, and where to look next.

Featured entries should be used sparingly for proposals or upgrade clusters that deserve additional attention from validators, builders, or ecosystem teams.
statusGuide:
Statuses are pulled from the upstream SIMD source and should be read as process metadata first. Review and accepted proposals often represent active coordination work, while implemented or activated proposals indicate work that has already moved further into the network lifecycle.

This page favors lists over cards so readers can scan a larger set of changes quickly, compare related SIMDs, and follow proposal links directly when they need the full technical details.
